prompt: Show a settings card with three notification preference switch fields: 'Email notifications' (on by default), 'Push notifications', and 'SMS notifications'.
reference:
import { Card } from '@tale-ui/react/card';
import { Column } from '@tale-ui/react/column';
import { Text } from '@tale-ui/react/text';
import { SwitchField } from '@tale-ui/react/switch-field';

export function Example() {
  return (
    <Card.Root>
      <Card.Header>
        <Text variant="title" size="m">Notification Preferences</Text>
      </Card.Header>
      <Card.Body>
        <Column gap="m">
          <SwitchField.Root defaultSelected>
            <SwitchField.Button>
              <SwitchField.Thumb />
              Email notifications
            </SwitchField.Button>
          </SwitchField.Root>
          <SwitchField.Root>
            <SwitchField.Button>
              <SwitchField.Thumb />
              Push notifications
            </SwitchField.Button>
          </SwitchField.Root>
          <SwitchField.Root>
            <SwitchField.Button>
              <SwitchField.Thumb />
              SMS notifications
            </SwitchField.Button>
          </SwitchField.Root>
        </Column>
      </Card.Body>
    </Card.Root>
  );
}
